knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-027-Model-Risk-Management Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: MR-024 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: MR-001 Model inventory required | Preventive | Reject production use of unregistered model | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-002 Risk tier required | Preventive | Reject registration without tier | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-003 Owner required | Preventive | Reject registration without owner | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-004 Independent validator required | Preventive | Reject registration without validator | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-005 Validation before production | Preventive | Block production deployment | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-006 Approved intended use | Preventive | Reject use outside approved scope | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-007 Prohibited use documented | Evidence | Require documented prohibited use | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-008 Data lineage | Evidence | Block certification without lineage | Critical | Data Governance. MR-009 Methodology versioning | Evidence | Require version on change | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-010 Implementation verification | Preventive | Reject unverified implementation | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-011 Benchmarking | Detective | Require benchmark comparison | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-012 Sensitivity testing | Detective | Require sensitivity results before production | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-013 Stress testing | Detective | Require stress results before production | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-014 Bias/fairness testing | Detective | Block protected-trait bias in production | High | AI Governance. MR-015 Explainability | Evidence | Require explainability documentation | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-016 Limitations visible | Preventive | Block display without limitations | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-017 Monitoring thresholds | Preventive | Restrict model exceeding threshold | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-018 Drift escalation | Corrective | Escalate detected drift | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-019 Override tracking | Evidence | Log all overrides | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-020 Change approval | Preventive | Reject unapproved model change | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-021 Prompt/tool change review | Preventive | Require review for AI prompt/tool changes | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-022 Restriction/kill switch | Preventive | Require functioning shutdown capability | Critical | Model Risk Committee. MR-023 Retirement control | Governance | Require approved retirement process | High | Model Risk Committee. MR-024 Cross-tenant access denial | Preventive | Deny | Critical | Security. MR-025 No self-validation/approval | Preventive | Reject owner as validator | Critical | Model Risk Committee.
